message:
fix: gofmt import.go and update stale embedded dolt from_jsonl test

The from_jsonl test expected CreateIssuesWithFullOptions to not be
implemented, but it was implemented in create_issue.go. Update the
test to expect success.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ EXAMPLES:
   bd import backup.jsonl           # Import from a specific file
   bd import --dry-run              # Show what would be imported`,
 	GroupID: "sync",
-	RunE:   runImport,
+	RunE:    runImport,
 }
 
 var (
